strategy_reasoning: Using a cozy, Stardew-esque visual narrative makes infrastructure updates feel approachable and warm. Translating technical features (like file uploads and cache invalidation) into physical pixel-art metaphors (folders, eating old documents) keeps the tone playful but informative.
visual_style: Cozy 8-bit pixel art, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, prominent use of lime green (#ecf874), chunky Stardew Valley/A Short Hike retro aesthetics.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a small pixelated file folder, screen glowing lime green (#ecf874). The main character, a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown horizontal stripes, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink blush marks, and small translucent wings, hovers nearby wearing a tiny painter's beret. Soft pastel gradient background in mint and peach. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'UPLOAD'. Nostalgic but beautiful. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.
images.description: Robot and Polly showcasing the new file upload feature and homepage redesign.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the main character, a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown horizontal stripes, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink blush marks, and small translucent wings, wearing tiny wizard glasses. She is looking up at a large retro terminal screen glowing lime green (#ecf874) displaying glowing data streams. Soft lavender and warm cream gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike. Nostalgic but beautiful. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.
images.description: Polly solo, representing the massive Qwen3.5 model addition and the new model monitor.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a round tan mochi-ball creature happily eating a stack of old documents, speech bubble: 'NOMNOM' in pixel font. Beside it is the main character, a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown horizontal stripes, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink blush marks, and translucent wings, watering a glowing lime green (#ecf874) seed sprouting from a pot. Soft mint and lavender gradient background. Large visible pixels, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, warm lighting. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.
images.description: Nomnom eating old cache data while Polly waters a Seed tier plant, representing cache fixes and tier clarity.

caption:
6 PRs merged this week. The play page finally lets you upload files, and we gave the homepage and model monitor some fresh paint.

Under the hood: Qwen3.5 (397B) is now wired up via Fireworks and ready to chat. We also fixed some weirdness with KV caching when API key permissions change, and clarified the rules for Seed tier dev points so you actually know how you're leveling up.

Check the repo for the full changelog or just go build something.
alt_text: Carousel of 3 pixel art images featuring a cute bee mascot, a monitor-headed robot, and a round mochi creature interacting with retro computers, file folders, and glowing green plants.
